name: critical-thinking-for-humans
description: A gym for your critical thinking — the AI is the coach, you do the work. Four modes across distinct epistemic stances: drill (12 argument structures, single defensible answer), scene (Socratic frames, never ranks interpretations, plus a fallacy-recognition track), expedition (audit verified impossible-tier problem packs), detective (crack a runtime-generated multi-layer case flaw by flaw). Manipulation-recognition domain, thirteen redlines, and a longitudinal passport on your own machine.
